Speaker 1: Mail call, Rachel Green, bunk seven.
Rachel Green: Thank you. Oh, cool! Free sample of coffee!
Speaker 1: Oh good! 'Cause where else would we get any?
Rachel Green: Oh. Right. ...Oh great.
Speaker 1: What is it?
Rachel Green: Country club newsletter. My mother sends me the engagement notices for 'inspiration.' Oh my God! Oh my God, it's Barry and Mindy!
Speaker 1: Barry who you almost...?
Rachel Green: Barry who I almost.
Speaker 1: And Mindy, your maid of...?
Rachel Green: Mindy, my maid of. Oh!
Speaker 1: That's Mindy? Wow, she is pretty. Lucky. To have had a friend like you.
